name: Scene Report: Venice Biennale
tagline: Seven dispatches from Zimbabwe's pavilion at the 61st Venice Biennale
description: A week inside the Pavilion of Zimbabwe — an essay from opening night, plus five studio-deep profiles and one performance dispatch.
